metadata.description: Estimate the real cost to rebuild any codebase from scratch. Goes beyond LOC to measure rebuild difficulty across 5 dimensions: domain knowledge, infrastructure coupling, data model depth, integration surface, and operational maturity.

plugins.name: codeworth
plugins.description: Analyze a code repository and produce a detailed human time and cost estimate for rebuilding it from scratch. Goes beyond LOC counting to measure rebuild difficulty — the specialized knowledge, domain expertise, infrastructure coupling, data model depth, and operational maturity encoded in a codebase. Ideal for acquisition due diligence, rewrite scoping, freelancer pricing, and engineering effort audits.

plugins.name: spec-auditor
plugins.description: Adversarially audits product specs, PRDs, and feature briefs before they reach engineering.
